author: mohitgrover0376
content:
Hey everyone, Mohit this side. Excited to contribute to EPF 7

I've been exploring ethereum codebases and I checked out the project Ideas, I am interested in interop testing and consensus clients. I have explored - 
1. Ream BlackBox Interop Testing for PQ Lean Consensus - Looked into codebase of hive, checked existing test suites and found a direction for the project.
2. Moonglass: Rust + Consensus - Checked out the codebase and found Execution Engine Validity and Network Spec Implementation to be of my interests.

A bit of detail of my findings are mentioned in this Week0 update https://hackmd.io/@groverInnovate/EPF7_Week0

I will looking to explore these projects in more detail and can also explore new directions.

I would appreciate any feedback from you guys, thanks!
